title: High Protein Chicken Taco Soup (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: High Protein Chicken Taco Soup is a comforting bowl built around lean chicken, beans, and warm taco spices. It is easy to cook in batches and simple to log in Eati for accurate calories and protein.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken (breast or chopped)
- Onion and garlic
- Taco seasoning
- Chicken broth
- Diced tomatoes
- Black beans or beans of choice
- Corn
- Lime
- Optional: chopped cilantro, jalapeno, and a light topping

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Cook onion and garlic in a pot until fragrant.
2. Add chicken and taco seasoning, then stir until coated.
3. Pour in broth and tomatoes; simmer until the chicken is cooked through.
4. Stir in beans and corn and simmer a few more minutes.
5. Finish with lime juice and serve. Log your portion in Eati to dial in your macros.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 463 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 9.8g
Protein: 47g

Tip: choose a lighter topping to keep fat lower while preserving flavor.

conclusion: This taco soup is an effortless way to get a high-protein dinner that still feels comforting. Use Eati to track servings and keep your calorie deficit working.
